title: [MTR/NTE] GBT: Traffic Signs
description: A Chinese style traffic signs signage resource pack based on Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75d4336b976cc028204c098f2bde4058bf75dd0a_0.webp)

在 [MTRBBS](//www.mtrbbs.top/thread-6274-1-1.html) 有详细的中文介绍帖。

[Main Package / 主包](//modrinth.com/resourcepack/gbt)

[![website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb0c64509635bd93da46883240a2fe13ed2f791a.png)](//gbt.gteh.top)
![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034cb98344b42f7609c074bc2359d5e291b4e382.png)

## Precautions

**You must have the Minecraft Transit Railway mod 3.0.0+ to make this work! (Supported 4.0.0)**

**您需要安装 Minecraft Transit Railway 3.0.0+ 使其工作！（支持 4.0.0）**

**NTE is only required for MTR 4.0.0-**

**仅搭配 MTR 4.0.0- 使用时需要 NTE**

**Please test before using this resource pack.**

**在使用本资源包前，请先存档测试。**

**Copyright Notice**: Unauthorized reproduction or modification of additional content is **PROHIBITED**. **UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES** is any form of reselling or profit-making behavior allowed. Integration or use in single-player worlds and servers is permitted without prior notice.

**版权声明**：未经允许**禁止**转载、整合、修改追加内容；不论任何情况，**禁止**一切倒卖、盈利的行为。可以在不事先通知的情况下整合或在单人存档和服务器内使用。

## Introduction

This release of the road traffic sign pack aims to address the issues that various road MODs/add-ons have not fully resolved. Originally planned as part of the GBT module, this add-on is being released in advance due to the indefinite delay of the MOD release.

Currently, none of the road MODs I have used fully replicate GB 5768.2. Even those that partially replicate it are missing some signs. Therefore, I created a very simple add-on based on NTE decorations. The official version will likely only fix bugs without adding new content.

At present, only some basic signs have been replicated, and most signs larger than one block have not yet been updated.

\* These nice badges come from [Devin's Badges](//intergrav.github.io/devins-badges-docs/)
